message:
fix(dtype): expand safe cast rules for 64-bit integers and complex-to-string

Update promote() so Str wins against all non-Structured types (was
Str+Str only). Expand safe_integer_cast: F64 and Complex128 now accept
I64 and U64 as safe casts, and Complex64/Complex128 gain safe-cast-
to-Str paths. Unify float/complex destination logic into a single
block with dst_bits lookup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
